title: Elden Dog Jump-scare (Optifine)
description: Changes the guardian curse into a guard dog (you can change the texture if you want)
body:
Was sent a photo of someone's dog being the water temple boss, now it's a texture pack.
This only changes the curse sound (growling) and jump-scare , not the elder guardian itself. Requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)

 

Feel free to take the texture pack and change the guardian texture, just credit and provide link to the base pack if you post it.
